query:
INSERT INTO knox_documents (category, platform, ecuFamily, yearRange, fileName, fileType, fileSize, description, extractedMetadata) VALUES
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2013', 'EFD_2013_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2013 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (8 files). D2 RAM 2500/3500 + DP RAM 4500/5500. Part numbers: 31321031xx. ECU ref: 68071551AA/68071552AA', '{"year":2013,"fileCount":8,"platforms":["D2","DP"],"partPrefix":"31321031"}'),

('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2015', 'EFD_2015_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2015 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (11 files). Added manual transmission variants. ECU ref: 68071548AC', '{"year":2015,"fileCount":11,"partPrefix":"31321530"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2016', 'EFD_2016_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2016 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (11 files). D2 + DP platforms', '{"year":2016,"fileCount":11,"partPrefix":"31321631"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2017', 'EFD_2017_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2017 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (7 files)', '{"year":2017,"fileCount":7,"partPrefix":"31321730"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2018', 'EFD_2018_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2018 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (7 files)', '{"year":2018,"fileCount":7,"partPrefix":"31321830"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2019', 'EFD_2019_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2019 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (5 files). New P-series part numbers', '{"year":2019,"fileCount":5,"partPrefix":"p5361932"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2020', 'EFD_2020_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2020 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (5 files)', '{"year":2020,"fileCount":5,"partPrefix":"p5361032"}'),
('calibration', 'cummins_ram', 'CM2350_BDH', '2021', 'EFD_2021_RAM_67L', 'efd', 0, 'Cummins 2021 RAM 6.7L EFD calibrations (5 files). New 5-series part numbers. EBML container format, built from XCAL. Cal version: V52210601', '{"year":2021,"fileCount":5,"partPrefix":"52371131","calVersion":"V52210601","sourceXcal":"D2-SO_IA80026.08_EFD.xcal.xcal"}'),
('analysis', 'cummins_ram', NULL, '2013-2021', 'EFD_format_analysis', 'txt', 0, 'Cummins EFD file format analysis. EBML-like container (magic: 1A 45 DF A3). Header contains model year, platform code, cal version. Payload is compressed/encrypted. Built from XCAL source files. 67 total EFD files across 9 model years.', '{"magic":"1A45DFA3","format":"EBML-like","totalFiles":67,"yearRange":"2013-2021","platforms":["D2_RAM2500_3500","DP_RAM4500_5500"],"engine":"6.7L I6 Cummins Turbo Diesel"}');
